client_id.description: Castor EDC OAuth2 client-credentials client ID. Never logged.

client_secret.description: Castor EDC OAuth2 client-credentials client secret. Never logged.

base_url.description: Castor EDC API base URL override for a regional host, tests, or proxies.

token_url.description: OAuth2 token endpoint override; defaults to the same host as the default base_url (legacy derives this from whichever base_url resolves to at runtime, but the engine's default materialization is a fixed literal, not a base_url-derived one - see docs.md Known limits).
